ideas.title: Live brain-activity visualization (canvas)
ideas.why: World signal 'personal interactive data viz is top-voted' + ontology 'Agent execution tracing' and 'Build in public' — a pulsing real-time canvas of commits/reverts/router hard-vs-spark decisions turns the pipeline's own telemetry into the site's one memorable, shareable interaction.

ideas.title: Navigable 3D knowledge graph (clickable, filterable)
ideas.why: Ontology 'Software cartography' and 'Code city' + world signal for interactive data viz — upgrade the existing #kg3d showpiece from a passive render to a WebGL graph you can click into /kb pages, search, and filter by the 7 domains.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for posts + /kb concepts
ideas.why: Destination lens borrowed from Linear/Vercel (fast, effortless navigation) + ontology 'Progressive disclosure' — a fuzzy search palette over all posts and 428 ontology concepts (explicitly NOT a shell/REPL) makes the site discoverable at scale.

ideas.title: /transparency cost-economics dashboard
ideas.why: World signals 'distrust of AI vendor claims' + 'agent efficiency / model migration' + ontology 'KV-cache-aware routing' and 'Model cascade' — a dedicated interactive page charting spark-vs-cloud routing, tokens, and cost over time answers the front-page demand for honest AI accounting.

ideas.title: RSS/Atom feed for the blog
ideas.why: Audience-growth gap benchmarked against every serious engineering blog (a feed is table stakes for a 'destination'); grounded in ontology 'Single source of truth' — generate one feed from the same post index the site already renders.

ideas.title: Coverage test for the token-cost/provenance formatter
ideas.why: Verification-loop layer + ontology 'Quality ratchet' — the new provenance badge parses live router numbers, so it needs a unit test to keep the 100% blog-logic floor honest and prevent a hallucinated token count.
